questions.text: Has all the information necessary for the development and use of the AI system been identified?
questions.category: MG01 - Identifying the Necessary Information

questions.text: Has the necessary information been documented?
questions.category: MG01 - Identifying the Necessary Information

questions.text: Have the sources of the data used been identified?
questions.category: MG02 - Establishing the Data Collection Process

questions.text: Has a data collection process been established?
questions.category: MG02 - Establishing the Data Collection Process

questions.text: Have the dimensions of data quality to be evaluated been defined?
questions.category: MG03 - Determine the quality dimensions to be evaluated

questions.text: Have specific quality controls been defined for each dimension identified?
questions.category: MG04 - Define the quality controls to implement for each dimension

questions.text: Have the defined quality controls been implemented?
questions.category: MG05 - Implement defined quality controls

questions.text: Have the results of the quality controls implemented been verified?
questions.category: MG05 - Implement defined quality controls

questions.text: Have the results of quality controls been reported?
questions.category: MG06 - Report the results of quality controls

questions.text: Have the deviations detected in the quality controls been documented?
questions.category: MG06 - Report the results of quality controls

questions.text: Have improvement plans been developed based on quality results?
questions.category: MG07 - Develop data quality improvement measures

questions.text: Have the improvement measures implemented been documented?
questions.category: MG07 - Develop data quality improvement measures

questions.text: Has the data been transformed to suit the needs of the AI system?
questions.category: MG08 - Data transformation

questions.text: Has data from different sources been added?
questions.category: MG09 - Data Aggregation

questions.text: Have the data aggregation processes carried out been documented?
questions.category: MG09 - Data Aggregation

questions.text: Is the data properly sampled?
questions.category: MG10 - Sampling the data

questions.text: After the initial data collection process and subsequent processing, have you identified additional data needs or data characteristics?
questions.category: MG11 - Creating and selecting features

questions.text: Have you considered increasing or reducing the dimensionality of the dataset to create features or discarding those that are redundant?
questions.category: MG11 - Creating and selecting features

questions.text: Has the data been enriched and expanded?
questions.category: MG12 - Data Enrichment

questions.text: Have identification labels been assigned to the data collected?
questions.category: MG13 - Data labeling

questions.text: Have automatic data labeling tools been used? Has the process been overseen by some kind of human surveillance?
questions.category: MG13 - Data labeling

questions.text: Has the potential bias of the data collected been analysed and assessed?
questions.category: MG14 - Analysis of the main sources of bias in the data

questions.text: Has bias been identified in the data?
questions.category: MG15 - Assessing bias in data

questions.text: If yes, has an analysis and evaluation been done to determine the need for treatment measures?
questions.category: MG15 - Assessing bias in data

questions.text: Have measures been implemented to address the biases identified and assessed?
questions.category: MG16 - Addressing bias in data

questions.text: If in the last phase of the data life cycle, the data will be transferred, has a report been generated with all the details of the data transfer process addressed?
questions.category: MG17 - Data transfer

questions.text: Has it been verified that there is no user or actor involved in the development of the AI system that still requires access to the data for a specific reason or purpose?
questions.category: MG18 - Full or partial deletion of data

questions.text: Has it been verified that the data deletion process to be carried out does not violate any legal, contractual or data retention obligations?
questions.category: MG18 - Full or partial deletion of data

questions.text: Has it been verified that the data will be deleted from all locations where it may be stored?
questions.category: MG18 - Full or partial deletion of data

questions.text: Has it been evaluated whether there is any possibility of restoring the data, partial or total, from the AI system trained on this data?
questions.category: MG18 - Full or partial deletion of data

questions.text: Has the data been checked for any cultural, social or historical significance?
questions.category: MG18 - Full or partial deletion of data

questions.text: Has a report been generated with all the details of the data deletion process?
questions.category: MG18 - Full or partial deletion of data

questions.text: Have you been informed about the security and privacy protection measures in terms of anonymization that have been implemented?
questions.category: MG19 - Data anonymization

questions.text: Have you been informed about the security and privacy protection measures in terms of pseudonymization that have been implemented?
questions.category: MG20 - Data pseudonymization

questions.text: Have you been informed about the possible presence of personal data or special categories of personal data?
questions.category: MG21 - Guarantee measures derived from the regulations on the protection of personal data

questions.text: Have you been informed about possible misuses and reasonably foreseeable uses of the data provided?
questions.category: MG21 - Guarantee measures derived from the regulations on the protection of personal data

questions.text: Have additional details of the data and metadata necessary to facilitate the understanding of the data and its appropriate use for the development of the AI system been documented?
questions.category: MG21 - Guarantee measures derived from the regulations on the protection of personal data

questions.text: Is special personal data processed at any stage of the AI system's lifecycle?
questions.category: MG21 - Guarantee measures derived from the regulations on the protection of personal data
